items.title: Circle CEO Allaire defends decision not to freeze USDC in Drift exploit, citing ‘moral quandary’
items.whyYouShouldCare: Circle's decision not to freeze USDC during the Drift exploit highlights the complexities of liquidity management and trust in stablecoins within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Jito, KODA team up on institutional staking in South Korea
items.whyYouShouldCare: The partnership between Jito and KODA for institutional staking in South Korea could enhance Solana's appeal to larger investors, boosting network usage and liquidity.

items.title: The Fed is building competition for XRP’s core payments use case into the FedNow banking system
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Fed's development of a competing payment system to XRP may impact Solana's positioning in the payments sector, influencing its adoption and utility.
